description: Google is an American multinational technology company specializing in Internet-related services and products. These include online advertising technologies, a search engine, cloud computing, software, and hardware.
vision_statement: To make Google an indispensable part of the web, and to make the web an indispensable part of people's lives.
mission_statement: Organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful.
core_values: Empower users with information and tools
sales_motion: Alphabet Inc. primarily generates revenue through advertising, with a secondary focus on hardware and software sales.
exit_strategy_history: Google's exit from China in 2020 due to censorship concerns
ethical_sourcing: Alphabet Inc. has made commitments to responsible sourcing and supply chain management.
case_studies: Google's impact on the travel industry through Google Maps
Google's role in the development of self-driving cars
crisis_behavior: Alphabet Inc. has a crisis management plan in place, with a focus on transparency and communication.
